src/main/java/com/example/jeed/dao/Regio.general_idea: Added project header comment and class-level Javadoc for documentation purposes.

src/main/java/com/example/jeed/dao/Regio.general_idea: Added import for java.util.Objects to support new equals/hashCode implementation.
Implemented equals() and hashCode() methods using Objects utility for proper entity identity comparison.

src/main/java/com/example/jeed/dao/Regio.general_idea: Update the DAO constructor to explicitly inject the EntityManagerService dependency instead of relying on implicit initialization.

pom.xml.general_idea: Updated Maven compiler source and target properties from Java 17 to Java 21.
Replaced javax.servlet-api with jakarta.servlet-api to align with Jakarta EE 10 / Tomcat 10.1.
Replaced javax.annotation-api and javax.servlet jstl with jakarta.servlet.jsp.jstl-api for Jakarta EE compatibility.
Replaced legacy jstl implementation with GlassFish Jakarta JSTL implementation.
Upgraded PostgreSQL JDBC driver from 42.4.1 to 42.7.1.
Upgraded Maven WAR plugin from 3.3.2 to 3.4.0.
Removed JUnit, AssertJ, Tomcat JNDI, and Tomcat DBCP test dependencies.
pom.xml.human_impl: Removed junit-jupiter-engine, assertj-core, tomcat8jndi, and tomcat-dbcp dependencies.

README.md.general_idea: Update the README to reflect the migration from Java EE to Jakarta EE, specifying Java 21, Tomcat 10.1, and Hibernate 6.4.
README.md.human_impl: Replaced 'Java EE integration with DBMS via JPA' with a detailed list including 'Java 21', 'Apache Tomcat 10.1', and 'Hibernate ORM 6.4'.

README.md.general_idea: Add documentation regarding Eclipse IDE configuration for the new Tomcat runtime.
README.md.human_impl: Added bullet points for 'Eclipse IDE 2023-12' and instructions to set Runtime to Tomcat 10.1.

README.md.general_idea: Document the assumed PostgreSQL JDBC resource setup and Tomcat context configuration.
README.md.human_impl: Added section 'As JDBC resource, access to PostgreSQL is assumed' with details on placing JDBC jar in Tomcat lib and configuring context.xml.
